nodes.description: Small rounded glass square with dusty pink tint, 18 pt continuous corners, and subtle frosted material.
98 x 98 album artwork near top-left with the close x button inside the art bounds at the artwork top-left.
Three-dot settings trigger pinned to the widget top-right corner.
Bottom dark translucent strip with stopped or playing text and previous/play/next controls.

states.stopped: Shows Music is stopped. plus Please play music on Spotify... copy.
states.playing: Shows track title, artist, optional progress, and transport controls.
